author: manunlp
content:
With the latest (`50eb0ca851910d53466f714cfc41e681350e684a`) commit of the `optional-proofs` branch, Prysm is able to sync (from genesis tested only).

**Tested cases:**
- Only Prysm nodes, including the one starting a few epochs after genesis
- Only LH nodes + 1 Prysm node starting a few epochs after genesis
